name: Tomato Hodge-Podge
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut all vegetables finely and mix together well.
2. Add salt and mustard seed, then mix again.
3. Place the mixture in a large, clean bowl or stone crock with cover.
4. Pour vinegar over the mixture and cover it securely.
5. Keep the mixture refrigerated or in a cool place until flavors develop.
6. Serve with meats.
